rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Educ. Code §22.084, which governs criminal history record access for school bus drivers. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 22.084. ACCESS TO CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORDS OF SCHOOL BUS DRIVERS, BUS MONITORS, AND BUS AIDES.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict possible.
